problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
